current_run.description: Given an N-bit input x, the oracle computes a parity based on cyclic bit-products. A secret N-bit integer s specifies a cyclic shift amount. For each bit i from 0 to N-1, the oracle considers the product x_i * x_{(i+s) mod N}. The output of the oracle f(x) is the sum modulo 2 of these N products. The goal is to find s.
